name: Bean Burgers #2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Millet or brown rice; cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Process bread, one slice at a time, in a dry blender to form soft crumbs.
2. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
3. Form the mixture into 8 patties.
4. Brown each patty on both sides in a vegetable-oil sprayed non-stick skillet.
5. Serve as is or on whole wheat buns with lettuce, sprouts and ketchup, if desired. Per patty: 131 calories, 6 protein, 25 g carb, 6 g fat (4%).
